---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(BayesianId)
```

```{r}
set.seed(2012)
test_data = data.frame(x1 = rnorm(100), x2 = rnorm(100), f = rep(c("a", "b"), times = 50) |> as.factor()) |>
  dplyr::mutate(y = exp(1 + 1.5*x1 + 0.3*(f == "a") + rnorm(100)))

fit = breg_laplace(y ~ x1 + x2 + f, data = test_data, family = "lognormal_linear")

plot(fit, xvar = "x1")
```

```{r}
data("penguins")
test_data = na.omit(penguins) %>% dplyr::rename(y = sex, x1 = flipper_len, x2 = bill_len, f1 = island)

fit_laplace = breg_laplace(y ~ x1 + x2 + f1, data = test_data, family = "bernoulli_logistic", prior_scale = 100) # large prior scale -> results should be similar to MLE

fit_mcmc = breg_mcmc(y ~ x1 + x2 + f1, data = test_data, family = "bernoulli_logistic", prior_scale = 100) # large prior scale -> results should be similar to MLE

fit_glm = glm(y ~ x1 + x2 + f1, data = prepare_data(parse_formula(y ~ x1 + x2 + f1), test_data), family = binomial())
```

```{r}
data("penguins")
test_data = na.omit(penguins) %>% dplyr::rename(y = body_mass, x1 = flipper_len, x2 = bill_len, f1 = island, f2 = sex) |> dplyr::mutate(y = ifelse(y > 5000, 5000, y))

fit_laplace = breg_laplace(y ~ x1 + x2 + f1, 
                   data = test_data,
                   family = "right_censored_linear"
                   )

fit_mcmc = breg_mcmc(y ~ x1 + x2 + f1, 
                   data = test_data,
                   family = "right_censored_linear"
                   )
```

```{r}
plot(fit_laplace, group = "f1", xvar = "x1")
```

```{r}
plot.breg(fit_mcmc, group = "f1", xvar = "x1")
```

```{r}
data("Loblolly")
Loblolly = as.data.frame(Loblolly)
Loblolly$Seed = factor(Loblolly$Seed)
```

```{r}
Loblolly[1:15,]
```


```{r}
foo = parse_formula(height ~ age + (age | Seed))
```

```{r}
foo
```

```{r}
foo$random
```

```{r}
bar = paste(foo$lhs, "~", paste(foo$random$Seed, collapse = " + ")) |> formula()
bar
```

```{r}
Xg_list = list()
for(i in 1:length(levels(Loblolly$Seed))){
  Xg_list[[i]] = model.matrix(bar, data = Loblolly |> subset(Seed == levels(Loblolly$Seed)[[i]]))
}
```

```{r}
Xg = Matrix::bdiag(Xg_list)
```

```{r}
Xg
```

```{r}
glmm_matrix = function(formula, data){
  formula_info = parse_formula(formula)
  gfactor = names(formula_info$random)[1]
  gef_formula = paste(foo$lhs, "~", paste(formula_info$random[[gfactor]], collapse = " + ")) |> formula()
  
  Xg_list = list()
  for(i in 1:length(levels(data[,gfactor]))){
    data_subset = data[data[,gfactor] == levels(data[,gfactor])[[i]],]
    Xg_list[[i]] = model.matrix(gef_formula, data = data_subset)
  }
  Xg = bdiag(Xg_list)
  return(Xg)
}
```

```{r}
glmm_matrix(height ~ age + (age | Seed), data = Loblolly)
```
